# Korax Systems

> Bespoke software developers in the UK — workflow automation, desktop tools, and custom integrations for small businesses across North West England and the wider UK. Projects are fixed-price with no lock-in — software is owned outright and built to last.

## Services

- [Desktop Automation Tools](https://koraxsystems.co.uk/#services) — Custom Windows applications that replace manual, repetitive tasks, from data entry automation to file processing pipelines.
- [Workflow & Task Automation](https://koraxsystems.co.uk/#services) — Connect existing systems, eliminate copy-paste work, and automate scheduling, reporting, and notifications.
- [Ongoing Support & Maintenance](https://koraxsystems.co.uk/#services) — Continued support, updates, and improvements as business processes evolve.

## Business Philosophy & Target Market

- **Target Market:** UK small businesses.
- [Why Choose Us](https://koraxsystems.co.uk/#why) — We offer fixed-price projects with no lock-in. You own the custom-built software outright.
- [Our Process](https://koraxsystems.co.uk/#how) — Lean, straightforward milestone-based development from initial brief to handover.

## Contact

- [Get in Touch](https://koraxsystems.co.uk/#contact) — Contact Korax Systems for project inquiries or consultations.
